# OpenSIN Web Surface Plan

> Single source of truth for OpenSIN-AI websites, subpages, routes, owners, and deploy targets.

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/README.md)
- [Board](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/docs/board.md)
- [Standards](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/docs/standards.md)
- [Inventory](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/docs/inventory.md)
- [Matrix](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/docs/matrix.md)

## Key files

- [Registry](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/registry/web-surfaces.json)

- [Generate script](https://github.com/OpenSIN-AI/OpenSIN-Web-Surface-Plan/blob/main/scripts/generate-docs.mjs)
